nodes.name: apple-touch-icon.png
nodes.description: Apple touch icon (PNG) for KalkMate website. Black-on-white calculator outline icon featuring a stylized display showing a math/graph waveform and a keypad grid. Used by iOS Safari when users add the KalkMate site to their home screen; serves as branding/favicon asset.

edges.evidence: INFERRED: both are KalkMate website branding icon assets representing the calculator logo; likely visually identical or near-identical renditions at different sizes/formats.
INFERRED: shared KalkMate calculator branding icon used across web platform favicon/touch-icon variants.

summary: Apple touch icon PNG depicting KalkMate calculator logo (display with math graph + keypad) for iOS home-screen branding.
